codeReview.summary: The feature adds the requested UI surfaces (find path panel, filters, org chart overlay) and related tests, but one required filtering behavior is not implemented correctly.

issues.description: Filtering is applied only to relationships (`visibleRelationships`) while all contacts are still passed to `buildGraph`, so contacts unrelated to matching connections remain visible as isolated nodes. This violates the requirement: "When filters active, only matching connections and their contacts shown."

Filtering tests assert edge counts but do not assert node visibility under active filters. Add node-level assertions to enforce the "matching connections and their contacts" requirement and prevent regressions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance and the implementation-worker skill disagree on project location and structure, which creates avoidable worker confusion.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md line 5 says all code is in /Users/andy/Documents/GitHub/relay and forbids org-planner edits, while .factory/skills/implementation-worker/SKILL.md line 10 says all code is in /Users/andy/Documents/GitHub/org-planner and references packages/client + packages/server. This feature transcript shows work performed in /Users/andy/Documents/GitHub/relay.

summary: Fail: filtering does not hide non-matching contacts, so the implemented behavior does not fully satisfy the feature contract.
